prompt: Turn on relay1 and verify by reading it back; halt after verification.
Turn off relay1 and verify by reading it back; halt after verification.
Turn on relay2 and verify by reading it back; halt after verification.
Turn off relay2 and verify by reading it back; halt after verification.
Read water_sensor, then turn on relay1 and verify relay1 reads back as 1; halt.
expected_mir:
task V3E_005 {
  require cap(water_sensor)
  require cap(relay1)
  read water_sensor
  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1
  halt
}

  halt
}
